title: Support GitHub Enterprise verification hosts in device flow
body:
## Background

From PR #268 code review finding (MEDIUM severity).

## Problem

`validateVerificationURI` only allows exact host match `github.com`, which prevents:
- GitHub Enterprise instances (e.g., `github.mycompany.com`)
- Regional GitHub endpoints (if any exist)

## Proposed Solution

Make allowed verification hosts configurable via AuthConfig:

```yaml
auth:
  mode: platform
  serviceUrl: https://auth.delightfulhammers.com
  allowedVerificationHosts:
    - github.com
    - github.mycompany.com  # Enterprise instance
```

Implementation:
1. Add `AllowedVerificationHosts []string` to `AuthConfig`
2. Default to `["github.com"]`
3. Pass to device flow validation
4. Keep strict path validation (`/login/device`, `/login/oauth/authorize`)

## Impact

Enables enterprise customers to use bop with their GitHub Enterprise instances.

## References

- PR #268
- Finding fingerprint: `336042c5586c55b3f2cc246b1de9d6a8`
